title: NIT Mizoram Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram)
short_info: National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Mizoram. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Mizoram Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/women and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.details: Master degree (M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc.) in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Aerospace Engineering / Mathematics / Robotics / Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning / Data Science or relevant field with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CPI/CGPA in both M.Tech/M.E/M.Sc., and B.Tech/B.E/B.Sc. Desirable: good background in Mathematics and Programming in C/C++/Python

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 Per Month + HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Mizoram to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
